title: Public package pages and moderation safeguards

source.subject: feat: add moderation safeguards and public package pages

body:
Add moderation safeguards and public package pages.

## Provenance

## Catalog scope

- **Workstream:** `pckg-registry`

- **Domain:** `tooling`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **Registry dashboard and package docs foundation** (`v02-pckg-registry-foundation`).
